mottos: From subatomic signals to scalable algorithms.
Engineering complex hardware-software pipelines at the edge of detection.
Translating extreme-noise data into high-value intelligence.
Automating the impossible: 7 years of full-stack problem solving.

constellation.title: Engineering at the Physical Limit
constellation.subtitle: Cross-domain expertise forged in high-stakes R&D environments.

optics.title: Optics & Microscopy
optics.desc: Designing and automating high-resolution fluorescence microscopes to image and isolate single molecules.

surface.title: Surface Science & UHV
surface.desc: Mastering techniques like X-ray Photoemission Spectroscopy (XPS) and Scanning Tunneling Microscopy (STM) in Ultra-High Vacuum.

particle.title: Particle Physics & Detectors
particle.desc: Operating Gas Xenon TPCs and validating complex sensor arrays (CMOS, PIN, PMT) in extreme environments.

photochem.title: Photochemistry & Sensors
photochem.desc: Leveraging organic chemistry and photochemistry to characterize novel chemo-sensors for single ion tagging.

systems.title: Systems Orchestration
systems.desc: Architecting Python-based control suites to synchronize heterogeneous hardware and fully automate data acquisition.

ai.title: AI & Full-Stack Engineering
ai.desc: Deploying custom CNNs for high-noise signal detection and building end-to-end applications integrated with modern LLMs.

featuredProjects.sectionSubtitle: End-to-end systems built for high-stakes research and personal passion.

ratag.title: RITA: Physics Orchestration & Analytical Engine
ratag.pitch: A highly modular, functional programming-based orchestration engine built for strict auditability and scale. It automates physical DAQ hardware and processes heterogeneous data streams (PMT, PIN, electrometer) through a layered, three-tier architecture—translating raw subatomic signals into readable physics models.

manhattan.title: ManHatTan: Gamified NLP Learning Language Platform
manhattan.pitch: Architected an end-to-end language application integrating custom Kivy GUIs, automated data extraction from e-readers, SpaCy NLP embeddings, and LLM-generated dynamic exercises to drive spaced-repetition learning.

sabatsw.title: SabatSW: Fluorescence Microscopy Control
sabatsw.pitch: Engineered a centralized GUI to orchestrate high-resolution optical hardware. It unifies Python APIs for scientific CMOS cameras, precision Z-stages, and lasers, enabling automated autofocus and single-molecule fluorescence tracking.

xpssw.title: XpsSW: Spectroscopy Analytical Pipeline
xpssw.pitch: Engineered an automated data parsing and peak-fitting pipeline to replace manual XPS workflows, optimizing complex material science metrology.

scienceCareer.title: The R&D Track Record
scienceCareer.subtitle: From theoretical physics to full-stack systems engineering.
videoTitles: Blender 3D Simulation: Detector Topology & Ion Drift

items.summary: Developing a custom ion source and automated DAQ architecture for the BOLD experiment.
Advancing automated fluorescence microscopy and deploying machine learning for low-SNR signal detection.
bullets: Deployed CNNs for signal edge detection.
Achieved major algorithm speedups via Julia.

items.summary: Designed and automated a custom fluorescence microscope for single-molecule detection.
Characterized single-ion barium sensors in Ultra-High Vacuum using XPS and STM.
bullets: First experimental proof of dry-environment chelation.
Validated novel Atomic Layer Injection system.

items.summary: Drove the technological foundations of NEXT-BOLD and managed Gas Xenon TPC operations.
Conducted thesis research optimizing data acquisition systems for the XENON Dark Matter experiment.
bullets: Achieved 40% improvement in critical material cleanliness through A/B testing.

items.summary: Built a theoretical and experimental physics foundation across two European universities.

terminalFooter.headline: Ready to tackle the next complex system.
terminalFooter.subtext: Currently wrapping up Postdoc R&D. Seeking Senior Data / Systems Engineering roles to solve high-stakes architectural challenges.

terminal.location: Target Location: Valencia, Spain (Open to Remote / Relocation)
terminal.languages: Spoken Languages: Spanish (Native), English (Fluent, C2), German (B2), Hebrew (B1)
